section.heading: Nonapplicability of administrative procedure provisions

content.p: Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5, shall not apply to the use or exercise of any authority granted by this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Sept. 23, 1950, ch. 1024, title III, § 305, as added Pub. L. 88–290, Mar. 26, 1964, 78 Stat. 170.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: “Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5” substituted in text for “the Administrative Procedure Act, as amended” on authority of Pub. L. 89–554, § 7(b), Sept. 6, 1966, 80 Stat. 631, the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.
